creator: rometravelers
caption:
Watch Italy honor 80 years of history and democracy through @iampcast ’s lens!🇮🇹🎊

💡Italy’s Republic Day commemorates the founding of the Italian Republic in 1946, celebrating 80 years this year.

💡Major events take place in Rome, including Via dei Fori Imperiali, Altare della Patria, and Palazzo del Quirinale.

💡The celebrations include military parades, official ceremonies, and cultural programs across the country.

💡Citizens and visitors participate in honoring Italy’s history, democratic values, and national identity.

💡Republic Day is Italy’s most important national celebration, showcasing pride, heritage, and unity.

🏷️Tag the person you celebrated today with!✨

📍Rome 🇮🇹
